texts: Changed the tag filter for gifts to allow multiple selection. This applies to both the Gifts page and when selecting gifts while editing an MD plan. Also added a strict filtering toggle to accommodate this change.
Added tracking to the Gifts page in case anyone wants to use it for their E.G.O Gift Compendium completion tracking.
Added all Luxcavations to the encounters data. Also added links to them at the bottom of the Dispense and Training Calculator.
Changed encounters to be searchable (in the select menu) via their ids along with their names.

Added some checks for missing gifts in some pages (to prevent crashes in cases of outdated data files being served by the CDN). The gift will show up as missing or an empty icon instead of crashing the entire page.
